WISP Tycoon — Build your rural broadband empire

Choose Your Home State
Select a mode first.
Pick where you'll build your WISP empire. Difficulty scales with state size — Rhode Island is a sprint, Texas is a marathon.
Sprint: single state, 1-year clock. Hit your MRR target to win.
Select a state to see details.
WISP TYCOON
Rural Broadband Empire Builder
Build a broadband empire from the ground up.
The board just handed you the keys to a startup WISP. You have a laptop, a phone, and some cash. No towers. No subscribers. No excuses.

Sign up customers, hire staff, deploy infrastructure, and outcompete rivals across the country. Every decision shapes your company.
Your company name will appear in the game.
Sprint: hit MRR target in 1 year — Campaign: advance through 4 tiers
Expand coverage across counties and states
Manage churn, reputation, and random events

⚡
Sprint
1 simulated year. One state. Hit your MRR target before the clock runs out or the board pulls funding. Fast, intense, decisive.
1 state ~12 min real time Hard deadline
🗺
Campaign
Four tiers. Start local, expand regionally, build nationally. No hard clock — but the board loses patience if you stall. Fight on multiple fronts against multiple rivals.
Up to 50 states Board patience Open-ended
